<div class="mobile-tabber"><tabber>
|-|Regular =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="16" |Necromancer Stats
|-
!Level
!Total Price
!Damage
!Splash Damage
!Firerate
!Range
!Explosion Range
!Max Hits
!Projectile Speed
!Soul Meter
!Build Time
!Max Gravestones
!Gravestone Spawn Count
!Max Gravestone Level
!DPS<ref name="dps">DPS assumes only one enemy is hit and does not include unit DPS.<br/>For Level 4, DPS assumes all beams hit the same enemy and does not include unit DPS.</ref>
!Cost Efficiency
|-
|0
|{{Money|4,200}}
|15
|N/A
|1.208
|23
|N/A
|1
|75
|105
|1.5
|3
|3
|1
|12.42
|{{Money|338.24}}
|-
|1
|{{Money|8,150}}
|20
|N/A
|1.108
|23
|N/A
|1
|75
|125
|1
|3
|3
|1
|18.05
|{{Money|451.51}}
|-
|2
|{{Money|19,470}}
|30
|N/A
|1.108
|26
|N/A
|1
|75
|180
|1
|6
|3
|1
|27.08
|{{Money|719.09}}
|-
|3
|{{Money|46,120}}
|45
|N/A
|0.808
|28
|N/A
|1
|60
|405
|0.8
|6
|3
|2
|55.69
|{{Money|828.11}}
|-
|4
|{{Money|111,120}}
|30
|500
|0.408
|36
|5
|3
|N/A
|1,620
|0.8
|9
|3
|3
|220.59
|{{Money|503.74}}
|}
</div>

<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="11" |Skeleton Stats
|-
!Gravestone Level
!Unit
!Health
!Defense
!Speed
!Damage
!Firerate
!Tick
!Range
!Detections
!DPS<ref name="unitdps">DPS does not include collision damage and assumes only one enemy is hit by an unit.<br/>For the [[Executioner Skeleton]], DPS is calculated as (Damage ÷ Tick) ÷ Firerate.</ref>
|-
|1
|[[Skeleton (Unit)|Skeleton]]
|90
|N/A
|4
|N/A
|N/A
|N/A
|2
|N/A
|N/A
|-
|1
|[[Sword Skeleton]]
|120
|N/A
|3.3
|25
|0.708
|N/A
|6
|Hidden
|35.31
|-
|1–2
|[[Giant Skeleton (Unit)|Giant Skeleton]]
|1,200
|N/A
|3.5
|N/A
|N/A
|N/A
|2
|Hidden
|N/A
|-
|2–3
|[[Skeleton Knight]]
|235
|15%
|3.3
|90
|0.708
|N/A
|6
|Hidden
|127.12
|-
|2–3
|[[Hallow Guard (Unit)|Hallow Guard]]
|2,000
|15%
|3.5
|N/A
|N/A
|N/A
|2
|N/A
|N/A
|-
|3
|[[Executioner Skeleton]]
|3,000
|25%
|2
|75
|6.008
|0.1
|32
|Flying, Hidden
|124.83
|}
</div>

<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="5" |Raise the Dead Stats
|-
!Level
!Total Cost
!Max Units<ref name="maxunit">Units when gravestones are fully placed down and upgraded.</ref>
!Combined Total Health<ref name="cth">Health for units with defense is calculated as Health × Defense.</ref>
!Combined DPS<ref name="cdps">DPS does not include collision damage and assumes only one enemy is hit by an unit.<br>For the [[Executioner Skeleton]], DPS is calculated as (Damage ÷ Tick) ÷ Firerate.</ref>
|-
|0
|{{Money|4,200}}
|3x [[Skeleton]]
|270
|N/A
|-
|1
|{{Money|8,150}}
|3x [[Sword Skeleton]]
|360
|105.93
|-
|2
|{{Money|19,470}}
|1x [[Giant Skeleton (Unit)|Giant Skeleton]]<br/>5x [[Sword Skeleton]]
|1,800
|176.55
|-
|3
|{{Money|46,120}}
|2x [[Giant Skeleton (Unit)|Giant Skeleton]]<br/>2x [[Sword Skeleton]]<br/>1x [[Skeleton Knight]]<br/>1x [[Hallow Guard (Unit)|Hallow Guard]]
|5,210
|197.74
|-
|4
|{{Money|111,120}}
|1x [[Executioner Skeleton]]<br/>5x [[Skeleton Knight]]<br/>3x [[Hallow Guard (Unit)|Hallow Guard]]
|12,001
|760.43
|}
</div>
|-|PVP =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="16" |Necromancer Stats
|-
!Level
!Total Price
!Damage
!Splash Damage
!Firerate
!Range
!Explosion Range
!Max Hits
!Projectile Speed
!Soul Meter
!Build Time
!Max Gravestones
!Gravestone Spawn Count
!Max Gravestone Level
!DPS<ref name="dps"/>
!Cost Efficiency
|-
|0
|{{Money|1,500}}
|10
|N/A
|1.508
|21
|N/A
|1
|50
|50
|1.5
|2
|2
|1
|6.63
|{{Money|226.24}}
|-
|1
|{{Money|2,500}}
|12
|N/A
|1.208
|21
|N/A
|2
|50
|60
|1
|4
|2
|1
|9.93
|{{Money|186.3}}
|-
|2
|{{Money|6,000}}
|12
|N/A
|1.208
|24
|N/A
|2
|50
|96
|1
|6
|3
|1
|9.93
|{{Money|604.23}}
|-
|3
|{{Money|16,000}}
|30
|N/A
|0.808
|26
|N/A
|2
|50
|450
|0.8
|6
|3
|2
|37.13
|{{Money|430.92}}
|-
|4
|{{Money|56,000}}
|20
|500
|0.408
|32
|4
|3
|N/A
|1,440
|0.8
|9
|3
|3
|147.06
|{{Money|380.8}}
|}
</div>

<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="11" |Skeleton Stats
|-
!Gravestone Level
!Unit
!Health
!Defense
!Speed
!Damage
!Firerate
!Tick
!Range
!Detections
!DPS<ref name="unitdps"/>
|-
|1
|[[Skeleton (Unit)|Skeleton]]
|90
|N/A
|4
|N/A
|N/A
|N/A
|2
|N/A
|N/A
|-
|1-2
|[[Sword Skeleton]]
|90
|N/A
|3.5
|20
|0.808
|N/A
|6
|Hidden
|24.75
|-
|2
|[[Giant Skeleton (Unit)|Giant Skeleton]]
|1,200
|N/A
|3.5
|N/A
|N/A
|N/A
|2
|Hidden
|N/A
|-
|2-3
|[[Skeleton Knight]]
|250
|N/A
|3.5
|90
|0.658
|N/A
|6
|Hidden
|136.78
|-
|3
|[[Hallow Guard (Unit)|Hallow Guard]]
|2,000
|15%
|3.5
|N/A
|N/A
|N/A
|2
|N/A
|N/A
|-
|3
|[[Executioner Skeleton]]
|3,000
|25%
|2
|75
|6.008
|0.1
|32
|Flying, Hidden
|124.83
|}
</div>

<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="5" |Raise the Dead Stats
|-
!Level
!Total Cost
!Max Units<ref name="maxunit"/>
!Combined Total Health<ref name="cth"/>
!Combined DPS<ref name="cdps"/>
|-
|0
|{{Money|1,500}}
|2x [[Skeleton]]
|180
|N/A
|-
|1
|{{Money|2,500}}
|4x [[Skeleton]]
|360
|N/A
|-
|2
|{{Money|6,000}}
|3x [[Skeleton]]<br/>3x [[Sword Skeleton]]
|540
|74.25
|-
|3
|{{Money|16,000}}
|1x [[Giant Skeleton (Unit)|Giant Skeleton]]<br/>4x [[Sword Skeleton]]<br/>1x [[Skeleton Knight]]
|1,810
|235.78
|-
|4
|{{Money|56,000}}
|1x [[Executioner Skeleton]]<br/>6x [[Skeleton Knight]]<br/>2x [[Hallow Guard (Unit)|Hallow Guard]]
|9,850
|945.51
|}
</div>
</tabber></div>
